review_notes: Direct pixel authoring per card metrics (90 px standing, 15 px head, 17 px shoulders, seated crown-to-floor 68, pelvis on 24 px seat plane at frame y=69, feet on foot line y=93). Facing left 3/4, pendant light upper-left. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Inspected at 3x (game scale), 8x, and 16x head crops against ART_BIBLE section 8 people checklist. Breathing = 1 px chest/head lift; blink frame same geometry, lids only. Jacket unbuttoned only in scripted exhausted pose. No chair/table pixels; per-pose PNGs share this sheet's frame coordinates.
